message:
Use tmux.BinaryPath() consistently across all test files

Replace hardcoded "tmux" binary references with tmux.BinaryPath():
- unified_test.go: Use tmux.DefaultClient.IsInstalled() for availability check
- session_real_test.go: Use BinaryPath() for exec.Command calls
- E2E tests: Update all test files to use the centralized binary path

This ensures tests work correctly when tmux is installed in
non-standard locations or requires path resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
